text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Spring... Our spring is here. Everything starts now.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: This is the beginning of our year together!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You're running in the Osaka Hai first, right, Kita?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I hope you don't mind that I'll be running it
first. And you'll be competing in the Satsuki Sho
next, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep building ourselves up from here on out
so we'll be ready for the Arima Kinen at the end
of the year!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer! Umatter's buzzing with all kinds of
rumors!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
"Can Kitasan Black handle the distance? The
Osaka Hai's only 2,000 meters. Compared to the
Kikuka Sho and Arima Kinen, isn't that too
short?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that this race is shorter than the ones she
ran at the end of last year, but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
choice_data_list:
People were saying the Kikuka Sho was too
long for you last year, remember?

People were saying the Kikuka Sho was too
long for you last year, remember?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, they were. Now it's the complete
opposite...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I guess people are just going to talk no
matter how hard I try. There's no point worrying
about them, is there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We don't have to think about public opinion
anymore. Kitasan Black's track record and
confidence is enough to drown it all out now.
choice_data_list: Go prove what you can do!
Go prove what you can do!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Here I go! All I have to do is take care of
business. I'll conquer all the races, whether they're
1,000, 2,000, or 3,000 meters long!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Watch me, Dia. Here comes the first battle!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'll start off our journey together with a bang!
